name: emigration_intention_likelihood
description: Measures the respondent's personal disposition and perceived probability of leaving Mexico to live abroad, capturing both desire and anticipated behavior regarding emigration.

name: perceived_opportunity_structure
description: Measures the respondent's perception of available life opportunities in Mexico across economic and social domains, reflecting subjective assessments of structural mobility and access to resources.

name: transnational_social_ties
description: Measures the extent and nature of the respondent's social network connections to Mexicans living abroad, including family, friends, remittance flows, and frequency of contact, capturing embeddedness in transnational social fields.

name: attitudes_toward_foreigners_in_mexico
description: Measures the respondent's evaluative orientation toward immigrants living in Mexico, encompassing general opinion, perceived economic contribution, perceived discrimination, rights entitlements, and views on the appropriate number of foreigners in the country.

name: perceived_costs_benefits_mexican_emigration
description: Measures the respondent's beliefs about the consequences of Mexican emigration to the United States, including perceived benefits to Mexico, main disadvantages, discrimination faced by migrants, and the quality of jobs held by Mexicans abroad.
